title: lipochaeta connata subsp. acris
intro: Lipochaeta connata subsp. acris is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in Hawaii. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from fever, pain, and skin irritations. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in topical applications, highlighting its versatility in herbal preparations.
